nasb.text: for we have regard for what is honorable, not only in the sight of the Lord, but also in the sight of men.

esv.text: for we aim at what is honorable not only in the Lord’s sight but also in the sight of man.

cnv.text: 因為我們努力去作的，不僅是主認為是美的事，也是眾人認為是美的事。

ccb.text: 无论在主面前或在人面前，我们务求行事为人光明磊落。

csbs.text: 因为我们不仅要敬重主看为美善的事，也要敬重人看为美善的事。
